rules.name: Treat strong trace as warning, not value
rules.formula: strong S_e -> audit; not automatic value

rules.name: Treat value as non-guarantee of trace
rules.formula: high V_o -> audit propagation / registration / survival conditions; not automatic S_e

rules.name: Bidirectional trace-value separation
natural_language: Strong existence trace does not guarantee value.
Even the most sublime value does not guarantee strong existence trace.

rules.name: Diagnose coupling, not cooperation
rules.formula: decisive diagnostic = editability under finite cost

prevents: fragility ignored because value is assumed to survive
